rationale: Educ. Code §29.374 governs intervention rights in civil actions challenging program constitutionality. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A program participant, eligible child, education service provider, or vendor of educational products may intervene in any civil action challenging the constitutionality of the program.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education intervention statute.
